section.div: Data Science | Artificial Intelligence | Machine Learning
This repo includes Claude prompt curation to use Claude better.

div.div: can we clear noise on sensor data for anomaly detection?

I am recently working on a project where I've large amount of sensor data, and my main goal is to detect the failure of machine/sensor at a particular time, also explain why machine has an anomaly? ex. "Temprature accidently spikes up and pressure doesn't" I've one question? Some of my sensors is constant at whatever they're doing (example - sensor 3 is set to 100 always), what if i remove that? Will affect the decision of my model? However every sensor's performance is accountable here.
